a.xlink:title: Intersections between bounding boxes around each rank are computed.
return the one m2n, a ReceivedPartition can only have one m2n
True if this process is running the master.
Get the basic communication between the 2 masters.
True if this process is running a slave.
This method broadcasts the set of bounding boxes (gathered in the master rank) to the slaves...
Slaves call this method to receive the set of bounding boxes sent by the master.
Sets _bb to the union with the mesh from fromMapping resp. toMapping, also enlage by _safetyFactor...
Checks whether two bounding boxes are overlapping.
Number of ranks. This includes ranks from both participants, e.g. minimal size is 2...
Expand bounding box using another bounding box.
Increase the size of bounding box by safety margin.
Check whether the bounding box is at default state or not.
Sets the data counter to zero.
